I'm now identifying the key dependencies. I'm choosing `@google/genai` for the AI logic, specifically the `gemini-3-flash-preview` model for speed and logic performance. My implementation plan is taking shape. First, I'll set up the basic boilerplate. Next is the `gemini.ts` service with a `getRecommendations(userProfile)` function. Finally, I'm defining a `Card3D` component.

I'm drafting the Gemini service, using `gemini-3-flash-preview` with a system instruction to return recommendations in a strict JSON format. The schema is defined as an array of objects. I'm also now focusing on refining the code, specifically resolving `import type` errors and improving overall efficiency.
